MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Daniel J. Kelly, Esq. of HAIGHT, BROWN & BONESTEEL, LLP 986-7700 for Plaintiff/CRoss-Defendant TROUVER.NET moving for summary judgment/summary adjudication
William Weiner, Esq. 543-5805 for defendants/cross-complainants DATAWAY, INC. opposing party
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
First Cause of Action for rescission is DENIED -- triable issue of fact exist as to misrepresentation of LACHNER's qualifications. See Disputed Material Facts Nos. 1,3,4,5,6,7,12 and 13
Second Cause of Action for intentional misrepresentation is DENIED --triable issue of fact exist as to misrepresentation of LACHNER's qualifications. See Disputed Material Facts Nos. 1,3,4,5,6,7,12 and 13
Third Cause of ACtion -- negligent misrepresentation -- DENIED -- triable issue of fact exist as to misrepresentation of LACHNER's qualifications. See Disputed Material Facts Nos. 1,3,4,5,6,7,12 and 13
Fourth Cause of Action -- breach of contract -- DENIED -- triable issues of fact exist. See Disputed Facts Nos. 1,3,4,5,6,7,9,11,12 and 13.
Fifth Cause of ACtion for negligent -- DENIED.
O R D E R signed in open court. (jjm/RC) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
